desires: Stop feeling like I'm a fraud in my own group and get them to trust me enough to let me drop the assignment without losing face.
Get through this night so I can actually be there for the cohort hangout tomorrow and not look exhausted.
Finish that scholarship essay by Thursday because if I mess up my financial future, it ruins everything else.

goals.description: Send the full scholarship essay draft to my professor and close that loop immediately. I can't carry this weight alone anymore; it's not fair to them or to me.
goals.rationale: I just hit 'send' on a weak, unfinished message ('No more …'). That's not who I am. My integrity hinges on showing up fully for people I care about, especially now that I'm alone with these thoughts. Leaving it hanging makes me feel like a bad student, and that guilt is going to eat me alive before tomorrow's cohort call even gets started. Sending the full thing fixes the relationship loop right now; worrying about the financial details later is fine because I've got time, but ignoring the professor isn't an option.

goals.description: Hit snooze twice, then get into bed and actually sleep. No scrolling, no half-finished tasks. Just rest.
goals.rationale: My energy is already at 6/10 and I have 2 hours of sleep debt piling up. Pushing through to finish the scholarship app right now feels like a trap I keep falling into. Once I send that apology and get some real rest, I'll be fresher for the actual work. Prioritizing health doesn't mean failing my goals; it means I can hit them harder when I wake up. If I don't sleep, I'll crash before the cohort call anyway.

goals.description: Reschedule the catch-up with the cohort group via text. Keep it casual so they don't think I'm disappearing again.
goals.rationale: This is important for keeping my reputation intact, but it's not as urgent as fixing the immediate tension with my hallmate or getting some shut-eye. I'll handle this once I've sent the apology and maybe after I've had a decent night's sleep. Better to negotiate the timing properly than to ghost them out of exhaustion. If I try to do this while exhausted, they'll sense it and we won't connect well.

agent.last_reasoning: g1 is top priority; my integrity hinges on showing up fully for the professor now that I'm alone. Sending the full draft fixes the immediate tension and prevents guilt from eating me alive. I'll handle sleep (g2) after this message so they don't feel ignored.

goals.rationale: My affiliation axis demands I protect the relationship before anything else; ignoring the social cue would be selfish and hurt our closeness. But since I'm sleep-deprived and impulsive, I need that quick hit of fun right now to keep my brain online.

goals.description: Draft the scholarship essay and upload files (approx. 3 hours total).
goals.rationale: The money is important, but it's not urgent enough to override my current social needs or immediate dopamine cravings. I'll tackle this later when I have more energy.

desires: Get some immediate dopamine hit from the game stream before my brain completely shuts down from sleep debt.
